name: Ocal Browser V6.3.0 Beta
body:
OCAL BROWSER - UPDATE CATALOG
Version: 6.3.0 Beta
Release Date: June 5, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[SETTINGS & CONFIGURATION REDESIGN]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* STUDIO CARDS & ROWS: Completely rebuilt the settings UI (Search, Shortcuts, and Security sections) using the premium `.studio-card` and `.studio-row` layout patterns with clean, responsive styling.
* KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS: Re-implemented keyboard shortcut cards with clean, flat pill-shaped key caps (`.key-tag`) featuring soft background tints and elegant hover highlights.
* SEARCH ENGINE SELECTION: Created a unified, full-span selector grid containing branded, rounded circular icons for Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave, Yahoo, and custom providers.
* SMOOTH SCROLLBARS: Added a sleek, customized scrolling experience tailored for internal settings pages.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[AESTHETICS & BRANDING REFRESH]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* TOP BAR SEARCH ENGINE ICONS: Redesigned all search engine context icons (Google, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Brave, Yahoo) and the default magnifying glass icon in the topbar to be crisp, high-contrast white in dark mode (using currentColor inheritance), while dynamically rendering dark grey in light mode for excellent visibility.
* CRITICAL HIGH-RES ICON UPGRADES: Replaced legacy pixelated `.ico` files with custom multi-resolution icons (storing native 16x16, 32x32, 48x48, 64x64, 128x128, and 256x256 scaled layers) generated using Electron's nativeImage interpolation filter. This resolves taskbar and shortcut aliasing/pixelation issues on Windows.
* UNINSTALLER SURVEY LOGO: Updated the uninstaller feedback window logo to natively reference the new high-resolution PNG asset for clean presentation.
